# InFlightTracker.Complete method

Removes *id* from the in-flight set once a response has been received. It is safe to call this for an id that is not currently tracked.

```csharp
public void Complete(RequestId id)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| id | The identifier of the completed request. |
